name: bootstrap_policy
rationale: Gate 4 requires ≥2 independent admissible witnesses. In cold-start (no prior CI runs), bootstrap witnesses must be pre-populated by independent local executions covering gates 1–3 before the first CI merge. Gate 4 is PENDING in bootstrap witnesses; they attest to gates 1–3 only.
execution_ordering: 2. semantic reinterpretation check (removed components in EXTENSION/REFINEMENT)
4. gate_2: outcome preservation (unchanged components still match baseline)
5. gate_3: determinism (evidence gate identical across 3 runs)
7. gate_4: witness obligation (≥2 independent admissible witnesses)

bootstrap_witness_constraints.candidate_digest: sha256 of morphism spec excluding independent_execution
